examples: The half-filled bottle sloshes; the full bottle remains still.; The dabbler in knowledge chatters away; the wise man stays silent.
You dare say I am a dabbler!
He's not a dedicated musician but a dabbler.
To gain credibility, as well as traction, he must disprove the label of full-time dabbler.
Deciding how individual sports compare in popularity depends heavily on when someone goes from being a dabbler to a real player.
